plan_metadata.name: group: fill in azure serarch env

parameters.sample:
=== Generated Script ===
Language: bash

```bash
filepath="/home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects/vscuse_app_9yjEr/env/.env.local.user"

# Check if the file exists
if [ ! -f "$filepath" ]; then
  echo "File does not exist: $filepath"
  exit 1
fi

echo "AZURE_OPENAI_EMBEDDING_DEPLOYMENT_NAME=text-embedding-ada-002" >> "$filepath"
echo "AZURE_OPENAI_EMBEDDING_DEPLOYMENT=text-embedding-ada-002" >> "$filepath"
echo "SECRET_AZURE_SEARCH_KEY=${{secret:AZURE_SEARCH_KEY:}}" >> "$filepath"
echo "AZURE_SEARCH_ENDPOINT=https://atktest-ai-search.search.windows.net" >> "$filepath"

echo "Values added successfully."
```

Language: bash

```bash
ENV_FILE="/home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects/vscuse_app_9yjEr/env/.env.dev.user"

if [ -f "$ENV_FILE" ]; then
  # Add or replace environment variables
  sed -i '/^AZURE_OPENAI_EMBEDDING_DEPLOYMENT_NAME=/d' "$ENV_FILE"
  sed -i '/^AZURE_OPENAI_EMBEDDING_DEPLOYMENT=/d' "$ENV_FILE"
  sed -i '/^SECRET_AZURE_SEARCH_KEY=/d' "$ENV_FILE"
  sed -i '/^AZURE_SEARCH_ENDPOINT=/d' "$ENV_FILE"

  echo "AZURE_OPENAI_EMBEDDING_DEPLOYMENT_NAME=text-embedding-ada-002" >> "$ENV_FILE"
  echo "AZURE_OPENAI_EMBEDDING_DEPLOYMENT=text-embedding-ada-002" >> "$ENV_FILE"
  echo "SECRET_AZURE_SEARCH_KEY=${{secret:AZURE_SEARCH_KEY:}}" >> "$ENV_FILE"
  echo "AZURE_SEARCH_ENDPOINT=https://atktest-ai-search.search.windows.net" >> "$ENV_FILE"
  echo "Values added successfully."
else
  echo "File not found: $ENV_FILE"
  exit 1
fi
```

```bash
CONFIG_FILE="/home/vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects/vscuse_app_9yjEr/env/.env.playground.user"

touch "$CONFIG_FILE"
```
